summary: Replaced Canvas 2D rendering with Three.js WebGLRenderer, PerspectiveCamera, and Scene. Added placeholder IcosahedronGeometry wireframe mesh with ambient and directional lights. Updated resize handler for renderer.setSize and camera.updateProjectionMatrix. Rewrote render loop to use renderer.render(scene, camera) with placeholder mesh rotation. Updated GeometrySystem interface to accept THREE.Scene. Canvas 2D geometry systems (particleField, waveField) temporarily disabled with draw no-ops pending Three.js port. All 379 tests pass, build succeeds.
